highlights.description: Vendor-agnostic observability integration with OmniObserve (Datadog, New Relic, Dynatrace, OTLP)
SaaS marketplace infrastructure with Stripe billing and seat-based licensing
Redis-backed rate limiting with sliding window and token bucket algorithms
OAuth client management and provider abstraction for CoreAuth

added.description: Observability package with OmniObserve integration for metrics, traces, and logs
Marketplace package with Stripe subscription and seat-based licensing
OAuth client management service in `identity/oauthclient`
CoreAPI rate limiting package with policy-based controls
Redis-backed rate limiter with sliding window algorithm
Marketplace Ent entities: License, Listing, Subscription, SeatAssignment
CoreAuth provider abstraction layer for pluggable authentication
JWT claims enhancement with audience and issuer validation
Session middleware improvements with context utilities

documentation.description: Authorization PRD and TRD design documents

dependencies.description: Upgraded OmniObserve to v0.8.0 with unified entry point
Added Stripe Go SDK v82 for payment processing
Added Redis client for rate limiting

highlights.description: SpiceDB authorization provider for Zanzibar-style relationship-based access control (ReBAC)
Principal-based identity model supporting humans, agents, applications, and service principals
SCIM 2.0 user provisioning with CoreForge-compliant patch operations
Identity-authorization sync automatically maintains SpiceDB relationships on identity changes

added.description: SpiceDB authorization provider with embedded and remote modes
Principal identity model with type-specific extensions (Human, Agent, Application, ServicePrincipal)
GitHub-style organization system with owner, admin, member roles
SCIM 2.0 user provisioning endpoints with filter, patch, and bulk operations
Coreauth authentication server with Fosite-based OAuth 2.0
Credential and token management service for principals
Standardized API contract module with consistent error handling
Coreauth CLI for server and key management operations
User schema extended with profile fields (locale, timezone, avatar)
RelationshipSyncer interface for identity-authorization integration
No-op syncer for deployments without SpiceDB
SpiceDB integration tests with embedded server

changed.description: OAuth 2.0 implementation refactored for principal-based identity

documentation.description: SpiceDB setup guide for embedded and remote modes
SpiceDB schema reference with permission inheritance model
Authorization integration patterns and middleware examples

highlights.description: Batteries-included Go platform module for multi-tenant SaaS applications
Complete identity management with users, organizations, and memberships
Full OAuth 2.0 server implementation using Fosite with PKCE, client credentials, and JWT bearer grants
Session management with JWT, DPoP (RFC 9449) proof-of-possession, and BFF pattern

added.description: User accounts with email and Argon2id password hashing
Organizations for multi-tenant applications with name, slug, plan, and settings
Memberships with flexible role-based user-organization relationships
OAuth account linking for GitHub and Google providers
API key service for machine-to-machine authentication with scopes
OAuth 2.0 server using Fosite with Authorization Code + PKCE grant
Client Credentials grant for service-to-service authentication
Refresh Token grant with rotation and theft detection
JWT Bearer grant (RFC 7523) for service account authentication
Service accounts with RSA/EC key pairs for non-human identities
Token introspection (RFC 7662) and revocation (RFC 7009) endpoints
JWT service supporting HS256, RS256, and ES256 algorithms
DPoP (RFC 9449) proof-of-possession token binding implementation
Backend for Frontend (BFF) pattern with server-side sessions
GitHub and Google OAuth social login handlers
JWT Bearer and API key authentication middleware
Role-based access control (RBAC) with organization-scoped permissions
Casbin provider for advanced policy rules
Simple provider for lightweight permission checking
HTTP middleware for route protection (Chi and stdlib)
Feature flag engine with boolean, percentage, and user list flags
Organization-scoped feature flag evaluation
In-memory feature flag store for development and testing
PostgreSQL RLS policy generation and session variable helpers
Tenant isolation for multi-tenant data separation
Ent ORM integration with transaction helpers for tenant context

infrastructure.description: GitHub Actions CI workflow for build and test
GitHub Actions lint workflow with golangci-lint
Dependabot configuration for Go modules and GitHub Actions

documentation.description: Comprehensive MkDocs documentation site with Material theme
Getting started guides: installation, quickstart, configuration
Identity module documentation: users, organizations, memberships, API keys
OAuth 2.0 documentation: apps, authorization code, client credentials, service accounts, tokens
Integration guides: existing apps and migration
API reference and Ent schema documentation
PRD and TRD design documents for authentication and OAuth
README with badges, quick start examples, and module structure
